name: Watch 99_INBOX
notes: Watches 99_INBOX for any file change. Guard node filters to DECISION_LOG.md. If VAULT_PATH changes, update the path here and in both Code nodes.

name: Guard ├óΓé¼ΓÇ¥ DECISION_LOG only
notes: Requires NODE_FUNCTION_ALLOW_BUILTIN=fs in n8n env. Returns [] (stops execution) if changed file is not DECISION_LOG.md.

name: Parse + Write ESCALATED_ITEMS
notes: Reads markdown table from DECISION_LOG.md. Filters rows where Status = ESCALATED or DEFERRED. Writes OUTPUTS/ESCALATED_ITEMS.md. Returns [] (no-op) if nothing flagged.
